label: Keystone Telemetry Runtime
info: Compile/start/stop MBMU and PCS telemetry runtimes, store merged samples in global.NEW_telemetry.{equipment}, and publish SS40K MQTT payloads. Update the Modbus client host/port/unitId before use.
